arts.ttl: Tottenham, PSG’s £70M-Rated Target Reveals Transfer Stance Amid Man Utd Exit Rumors
arts.sum: Rúben Amorim’s decision to exclude Alejandro Garnacho from last month’s Manchester derby has fueled speculation about the winger’s future at Manchester United. According to a recent report from the Daily Mail, Garnacho is no longer seen as “untouchable” at Old Trafford, with several top European clubs—Bayern Munich, Paris Saint-Germain, AC Milan, Real Madrid, and Barcelona—keeping […] The post Tottenham, PSG’s £70M-Rated Target Reveals Transfer Stance Amid Man Utd Exit Rumors appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland insists he is confident Man City will defeat the Premier League in their seismic hearing over 115 financial charges... after signing new £500,000-a-week five-year deal
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola's Manchester City are now unbeaten in six matches across all competitions and look more buoyant after Erling Haaland committed the majority of his career to them.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland never thought about charges before committing to Manchester City
arts.sum: The forward signed a new nine-and-a-half-year contract on Friday.

arts.ttl: Team News: Paris Saint-Germain vs. Manchester City injury, suspension list, predicted XIs

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland loves his massive City contract extension because it is 'a bit unusual'
arts.sum: It’s going to be amazing,” Haaland said ahead of City’s crucial Champions League game against Paris Saint-Germain on Wednesday. The sheer size of it also seems to limit the possibility of him joining an even bigger club like Barcelona or Real Madrid in the years to come, unless one is prepared to pay a fortune.

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish to Manchester United transfer was 'really close' as Man City star makes exit claim
arts.sum: Jack Grealish has been linked with a move away from Man City with rivals Man United said to be monitoring his situation

arts.ttl: PSG vs. Man City: Four players left out as Pep Guardiola's 21-man Champions League squad is confirmed, Khusanov, Reis train
